decision_commentary: Cost basis is well-constructed. All key fields present: cost_per_sqm ($1,200 USD — defensible for Los Cabos), base construction cost ($259,200 = 216 × $1,200 — math correct), pool premium ($45,000), coastal site premium ($25,000), total construction ($329,200), architecture fee ($30,000, 9.1%), total estimate ($359,200), client budget ($200,000), budget gap ($159,200, 79.6%). Completeness scored 4: 'engineering_allowance' and 'contingency_pct' as named fields are absent — cost-basis.md rubric requires them. Method documented as parametric. Labeled as preliminary in notes. Budget gap clearly quantified — Marcela can immediately assess feasibility. State_sync scored 3 per simulated run note.
